title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lendingkart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lendingkart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lendingkart family as a Backend Developer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lendingkart:
Lendingkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart!
